subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Jan. 1909
subcodes.first_line: Today I am greatly wearied, for the Mufti, the Consul and others came, and how grievously did the day pass [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: من امروز خیلی خسته هستم امروز مفتی قنسول و دیگران آمدند چقدر بد گذشت
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment
